title: マイルCSの後に・ヘイルメリー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle emerges victorious from the heated
clash with a G1 race win under her belt!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race now over, Silence Suzuka makes a
revelation—Taiki's fiery running touched her to
the core and showed her what she was missing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both aiming for higher speed, Suzuka announces
her plans to run in Hong Kong, while Taiki sets
the Yasuda Kinen as her next target.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Mile Championship behind us, all that's
left is to wait for the Umamusume of the Year
announcement. Will Taiki Shuttle achieve her
dreams? Only time will tell.
